data.name: Essence Blade
data.detailed_description:
Essence Blade is a fantasy adventure with beat ’em up combat, focused on fast action, memorable bosses, and an emotional story about desire and choice. 

You play as Zymia, a swordswoman chosen by a mysterious blade that contains Aeris, the Dragon Goddess of Desire. Long ago, six other Dragon Goddesses sealed Aeris away, fearing her influence on the world. Now, that seal is weakening, and the journey begins. 

Guided by Lilith, a playful traveling companion who also acts as your shop, explore a world shaped by powerful Dragon Goddesses. Each region leads to a unique boss encounter, where combat is followed by conversations that reveal their reasons, regrets, and beliefs.

Combat is inspired by classic beat ’em ups: fast, responsive, and easy to pick up, with room to experiment. Unlock new abilities through cards earned with Essences, allowing you to shape your playstyle.

Essence Blade blends epic fantasy with emotional and sensual undertones, treating desire as a source of strength rather than corruption. The story unfolds naturally through dialogue, boss encounters, and the growing bond between Zymia, Lilith, and Aeris.

“Desire is not corruption… it is proof of will.”








Features:

  • Action Combat: Face waves of enemies and select card-based upgrades.

  • Monster Girl Encounters: Defeat and interact with charming foes.

  • Story Mode: An emotional story about desire and choice.

  • Arena Levels: Easy (10 rounds), Medium (20 rounds), Hard (30 rounds).

  • Boss Fights: Challenge and defeat each Dragon Goddess

  • Gallery: Unlock every enemy 2D art and rewatch their scenes in the INN.

  • Custom Controls: Fully remappable for keyboard and Xbox controller.

  • NSFW Options: Futanari, Strap-On, or turn off the sex scenes.

  • Languages: English and Spanish.

data.short_description: Essence Blade is a fantasy adventure with beat ’em up combat, focused on fast action, memorable bosses, and an emotional story about desire and choice.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD 2.5 GHz or superior
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit (Version 20H2)
  • 處理器: Six-Core Xeon E5-2643 @ 3.4GHz
  • 記憶體: 64 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 SUPER
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
